prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Finishing & curing, part of the Concrete & Masonry scope. The observed field condition is: no cure (blankets/compound absent in photo). The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: ACI 302, 308.
title: Fault diagnosis: Finishing & curing (residential job)
